meta_title: Mai Juyar Markdown zuwa WhatsApp — Kayan Aiki Kyauta na Kan Layi
meta_description: Juya Markdown zuwa tsarin WhatsApp a manna ɗaya. Sauya fitar ChatGPT da Claude zuwa rubutu mai kauri, mai ƙafa, da jerin abubuwa da ke nunawa daidai a tattaunawar WhatsApp. Kyauta, ba sai ka yi rajista ba, yana aiki a cikin browser ɗinka.
og_image_alt: Whatdown — Mai juyar Markdown zuwa WhatsApp
sample:
# Gwajin Markdown → WhatsApp

Manna kowane **Markdown** ka ga yadda yake nunawa. Kowane tsari da WhatsApp ke goyon baya yana cikin wannan misali:

- *Mai ƙafa* tare da alamar tauraro guda
- **Mai kauri** tare da alamun tauraro biyu
- ~~Wanda aka yanke~~ tare da alamun tilde biyu
- `Code` na ciki tare da backticks

Mai amfani don raba fitar LLM cikin tsabta:

```
prompt: taƙaita wannan PR
output: yana da kyau, aika shi
```

Takardu da tushen suna a https://whatdown.lebaux.co
tagline: Manna Markdown daga ChatGPT, Claude, ko kowane LLM. Kwafi rubutun da aka tsara don WhatsApp wanda yake nunawa daidai a tattaunawa — mai kauri, mai ƙafa, jerin abubuwa, da code, ba tare da karyewar alamun tauraro ba.
intro_h2: Juya Markdown zuwa tsarin WhatsApp a manna ɗaya
intro_p1: WhatsApp ba ya goyon bayan ƙa'idar Markdown. Manna fitar daga ChatGPT, Claude, ko kowane LLM kai tsaye cikin tattaunawa yana barin alamun tauraro masu bayyanawa, kauri da ya karye, da hanyoyin haɗi waɗanda ba a iya danna su. Wannan mai juyarwa yana sake rubuta Markdown zuwa tsari da WhatsApp ke fahimta da gaske — alamar tauraro guda don kauri, alamar ƙasa guda don ƙafa, tildes don yanke, da blocks na code waɗanda ke tsira da tafiya.
intro_p2_before_link: Yana aiki gabaɗaya a cikin browser ɗinka. Babu abin da aka loda, aka yi log, ko aka adana. Buɗaɗɗen tushe a
howto_h2: Yadda ake juya Markdown zuwa WhatsApp
howto_step1_body: Saka fitar ChatGPT, Claude, ko kowane LLM cikin akwatin shigar a hagu. Misalin rubutu yana nuna tsare-tsaren da ake goyon baya.
howto_step2_body_before: Bangaren dama yana nuna kumfar saƙon WhatsApp daidai yadda zai bayyana a tattaunawa. Canza
howto_step2_body_after: don bincika tushen da aka juya.
howto_step3_body_after: , canja zuwa WhatsApp, ka manna. An kiyaye kauri, ƙafa, yanke, code na ciki, blocks na code, da jerin alamomin bullet.
ref_intro: WhatsApp yana goyon bayan ƙaramin tsarin alamun tsari na ciki. Markdown na ƙa'ida yana amfani da masu raba dabam don yawancin waɗannan, wanda shi ne dalilin da yasa manna danyen Markdown ke samar da fitar da ya karye.
faq_q1: Shin WhatsApp yana goyon bayan Markdown?
faq_a1: WhatsApp yana goyon bayan ƙaramin sashin tsari kamar Markdown, amma ba CommonMark na ƙa'ida ba. Yana amfani da alamar tauraro guda don kauri, alamar ƙasa guda don ƙafa, alamar tilde guda don yanke, da backticks uku don code. Sarauta, rubutun ankara na hanyar haɗi, da jerin masu nest ba a goyon bayansu.
faq_q2: Yaya zan sa rubutu ya zama mai kauri a WhatsApp?
faq_a2_before_code: Naɗe rubutun a cikin alamun tauraro guda:
faq_a2_after_code: . Markdown na ƙa'ida yana amfani da alamun tauraro biyu, waɗanda WhatsApp ke nunawa azaman haruffa na zahiri.
faq_q3: Yaya zan sa rubutu ya zama mai ƙafa a WhatsApp?
faq_a3_before_code1: Naɗe rubutun a cikin alamun ƙasa guda:
faq_a3_middle: . Ƙafa na Markdown yana amfani da alamun tauraro guda (
faq_a3_after_code2: ), waɗanda a maimakon haka WhatsApp ke karantawa azaman kauri — sanadin yawancin matsaloli na manna.
faq_q4: Yaya zan kwafi fitar ChatGPT ko Claude zuwa WhatsApp?
faq_a4: Fitar LLM Markdown ne na ƙa'ida, don haka manna shi kai tsaye yana barin alamun tauraro masu bayyanawa da tsari da ya karye. Tafiyar da shi ta wannan mai juyarwa da farko — yana sake rubuta kauri, ƙafa, jerin abubuwa, da blocks na code zuwa tsarin WhatsApp a danna ɗaya.
faq_q5: Shin wannan kayan aiki yana aika rubutuna zuwa server?
faq_a5_before_link: A'a. Juyawa yana aiki gabaɗaya a cikin browser ɗinka. Babu abin da ke fita daga shafin. Tushen yana a
faq_q6: Me yasa manna Markdown kai tsaye cikin WhatsApp ke kallon karyayye?
faq_a6: WhatsApp yana amfani da masu raba daban da Markdown. Alamun tauraro biyu da tsarin haɗin braket suna nunawa azaman haruffa na zahiri. Juyawa zuwa tsarin mai raba haruffa guda na WhatsApp kafin manna yana gyara fitar.
faq_q7: Shin tsarin yana aiki a WhatsApp Web, mobile, da desktop?
faq_a7: Ee. Ƙa'idodin tsarin WhatsApp suna daidai a iOS, Android, WhatsApp Web, da kayan aikin desktop na WhatsApp. Saƙo da aka tsara akan abokin ciniki ɗaya yana nunawa iri ɗaya akan sauran.
why_h2: Me yasa WhatsApp ba ya amfani da Markdown na ƙa'ida?
why_intro: WhatsApp bai taɓa bayyana zaɓin a fili ba. Dalilan da ake iya tsammani sune cakuda ergonomics na rubutu na mobile, ƙa'idodin tattaunawa waɗanda suka rigaya Markdown, da ƙuntatawa na aikawa da zarar an kulle tsarin.
why_h3_keyboards: Madanan mobile suna fifita masu raba guda
why_p_keyboards_3: . A waya, alamun tauraro suna zaune a bayan canjin alamomi — taɓo huɗu kowace kalmar mai kauri yana ƙarawa. WhatsApp ya zaɓi
why_p_keyboards_6: : hali ɗaya kowane gefen, babu cunkoso tsakanin alamomi.
why_h3_documents: An gina Markdown don takardu, ba kumfar tattaunawa ba
why_p_documents: Sarauta, sakin layi, abubuwan da ake nuni a hanyar haɗi, jerin masu nest — kusan babu ɗayan da ke taswirar tsabta zuwa gajeren saƙo. Ɗaukar cikakken ƙa'idar zai nufin shigo da parser da tarin gefuna na musamman don amfani da fasali huɗu.
why_h3_chat: Tattaunawa tana da nasa ƙa'idodin da farko
why_p_chat_1: IRC da abokan ciniki na IM na farko sun yi amfani da
why_p_chat_3: azaman gajeriyar rubutun typographic tun kafin Markdown ya wanzu. Slack, Telegram, Discord da Signal kowane ɗayan ya bambanta da CommonMark ta hanyoyi daban-daban. Aikace-aikacen tattaunawa ba su taɓa daidaitawa akan shi azaman rukuni ba.
why_p_lockin_1: Da zarar tsari ya yi jigilar zuwa fiye da masu amfani biliyan a 2016, canzawa zuwa
why_p_lockin_2: zai karya kowane tsohon saƙon da kowa ya gungura zuwa shi a shiru.
footer_p1_before_lebaux: Wannan aiki buɗaɗɗen tushe ne kuma
footer_p2_before_link: Ana maraba da gudunmawa fiye da yadda za'a iya zato. Ka sami kuskure? Hanya mafi kyau ta nuna shi ita ce ta ƙaddamar da
